WebKitGTK MSE: appendBuffer silently aborts on chunks > 1 MiB

Standalone reproducer (no network). A short fragmented MP4 (testsrc 1280x720 / sine 440 Hz, ~2.2 MB, h264 + AAC) is embedded base64 below. The page feeds it into a MediaSource twice:

  1. Single append — one sb.appendBuffer(buf) call with the entire ~2.2 MB. Expected: updateend. Actual on WebKitGTK 2.52: error fires on the MediaSource with readyState="ended" and the first updateend never arrives.
  2. 1 MiB-chunked append — same buffer, sliced into 1 MiB pieces, each appended after the previous updateend. Expected and actual: PASS on WebKitGTK, Chromium, and Firefox.

The chunked path is the workaround currently shipping in BigBox (github.com/podheitor/BigBox), which intercepts blob:-backed videos in WhatsApp Web and Telegram Web and re-feeds them through MediaSource so WebKitGTK plays them with audio.
